THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOSOREK, JONATHAN IND. & DBA MARROW $2,503.63 PRINCIPAL, $33.82 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,537.45, (THE ORIGINAL PRINCIPAL/DAMAGES AMOUNT IS $3,853.63. A CREDIT OF $1,350.00 IS APPLIED TO THIS AMOUNT FOR A REMAINING PRINCIPAL/DAMAGES AMOUNT OF $2,503.63.) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
